rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks with valid syntax for assume, guarantee, eq, const, and assign statements
Place assumptions and guarantees in the appropriate component type or implementation scope
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if...then...else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) for contract expressions
generic_rules: Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations for assumptions and guarantees
Ensure AGREE type names are valid (int, real, bool)
Do not use AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions
Use exact visible identifiers from the current component scope
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE assumptions and guarantees should refer to component ports in valid scopes
Implementation-level bindings should be placed after subcomponents and connections
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if...then...else for branching logic
anti_patterns: Do not invent declarations for unresolved references; use existing visible identifiers
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit ports or constants
Do not use AGREE scalar type names (integer, boolean) in declarations
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
